extraction.one_line_summary: MARTINEZ Daniel attacked from 12-rider breakaway group on Col de Turini final climb, outsprinted LOPEZ Miguel Angel after dropping YATES Simon
tactical_patterns: Sky deliberately not represented in 39-rider breakaway, preferring to control from peloton despite GC threat from SCHILLHAMMER.
YATES Simon attacks first on Turini but three Colombian climbers Lopez/Martinez/Eder neutralize immediately through coordinated pacing.
MARTINEZ and LOPEZ collaborate to eliminate YATES before final sprint, revealing Colombian national team tactics within trade team structure.

rider_signals.SCHILLHAMMER Gogl: negative: dropped from breakaway on penultimate climb despite starting only 2:01 down, insufficient climbing legs when it mattered
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: slipped from 2nd to 4th overall, Sky's dual GC strategy failing under sustained climbing pressure
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: stayed with Martinez/Lopez group on Turini but unable to contest sprint finish against pure climbers
rider_signals.LEON SANCHEZ Luis: negative: 2009 winner dropped on final climb, age showing at 35 despite making 39-rider selection
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Bauke: negative: unable to follow Martinez/Lopez acceleration despite being in lead group, climbs too steep for his diesel tempo
